scope.target: Converge all active profile projections on the canonical environment grammar
constraints: Use only DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT or ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT for profile selection
Use the canonical InMemory, Outbox, TestInMemory, and TestOutbox names
Do not select persistence through Profiles:Mode or Repository:Mode

steps: Inventory active contradictory selectors and names
Rewrite templates/examples/guides against canonical environment selection
execution.last_completed_step: Converged active templates, examples, and guides on environment-only selection and canonical names; added a required fail-closed projection contract.

results.summary: Removed executable custom selectors, normalized environment names and filenames, prohibited EF Core in the InMemory template, and added aggregate-gate regression coverage.
results.residual_risk: The test checks known executable selectors and stale names; semantic profile correctness still depends on focused review and target tests.
